scripts.sync-dictionary: mkdir -p public/dictionary && cp -f data/merkle/meta.json data/merkle/words.json public/dictionary/
scripts.sync-tesseract: mkdir -p public/tesseract public/tesseract-core public/tesseract-lang && cp -f node_modules/tesseract.js/dist/worker.min.js public/tesseract/ && cp -f node_modules/tesseract.js-core/tesseract-core*.js public/tesseract-core/ && test -f public/tesseract-lang/eng.traineddata.gz || curl -fsSL -o public/tesseract-lang/eng.traineddata.gz https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tesseract.js-data/eng/4.0.0/eng.traineddata.gz
scripts.predev: npm run sync-circuits && npm run sync-dictionary && npm run sync-tesseract
scripts.prebuild: npm run sync-circuits && npm run sync-dictionary && npm run sync-tesseract
